c.d: Refers to the number of monthly active users on the platform. A larger user base increases the likelihood of connecting with more friends.
The variety of ways you can communicate (text, voice, video, stories, etc.) impacts how well you can keep in touch.
Privacy settings and encryption levels ensure secure conversations and control over who sees your content.
The app's capabilities for group chats, events, and shared activities that help maintain connections.
How simple and intuitive the app is to use, which affects how likely people are to use it regularly.
Ability to see what friends are doing in real-time encourages more spontaneous interactions.
